{{Dialogue|Skywalker|Master, I'm sure Obi-Wan and I would be of more use to you at Mirgoshir.|Kenobi|Anakin…|Yoda|Hmm. Ambitious, this one is!|Windu|I understand your eagerness, young Padawan. But an extra pair of Jedi pilots will not be enough to turn the tide at Mirgoshir.|attr=[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|src=<ref name="Game" />}}
The '''Mirgoshir campaign''' was a campaign that occurred during the early [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
{{Quote|Master Windu, the Separatists have completely withdrawn from the system. We're in position to move into the Mirgoshir system.|A [[Clone Captain/Legends|clone trooper captain]], to [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Game" />}}
Following the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] quickly moved its forces into the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]] to take control of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] and the [[Mirgoshir hyperspace crossroads|hyperspace crossroads]] of the [[Mirgoshir system/Legends|Mirgoshir system]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

[[File:Thule_aftermath.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces on [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], preparing to depart for the [[Mirgoshir system/Legends|Mirgoshir system]]]]
One [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the Battle of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] unleashed the [[Force Harvester]] on Agamar.<ref name="TNEC" /> Shortly after, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] destroyed the [[Dark Reaper]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] in the [[Battle of Thule]]. Following their victory on [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], the Republic forces under the command of [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] prepared to depart for the Mirgoshir system.<ref name="Game" />

Five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Battle of Geonosis, fighting was still occurring in the Mirgoshir system, where Separatist forces were unable to reinforce those [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Clone Wars)|fighting]] on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]].<ref name="Shaak" />

The [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] suffered catastrophic losses during the Mirgoshir campaign. Many Republic [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] were lost while traversing the natural bridges of Agamar, which collapsed under their heavy footfalls. These disastrous incidents later led to the development of the [[Unstable Terrain Artillery Transport/Legends|UT-AT]] [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] at the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="CSWE" /><ref name="DB" />
